name: satellite: GOES magnetometer (live)
source_note: NOAA SWPC / GOES primary satellite magnetometer — fetched 2026-07-11 01:11 UTC — Data: NOAA SWPC / GOES (public domain)

Hp.para1: This chart shows 23.9 hours of the north-south magnetic field at the satellite, in nT, recorded by a goes magnetometer — 1,438 measurements, one reading every 60 seconds. This is real, live data from NOAA SWPC / GOES primary satellite magnetometer, fetched 2026-07-11 01:11 UTC.

He.para1: This chart shows 23.9 hours of the earthward magnetic field at the satellite, in nT, recorded by a goes magnetometer — 1,438 measurements, one reading every 60 seconds. This is real, live data from NOAA SWPC / GOES primary satellite magnetometer, fetched 2026-07-11 01:11 UTC.

Hn.para1: This chart shows 23.9 hours of the eastward magnetic field at the satellite, in nT, recorded by a goes magnetometer — 1,438 measurements, one reading every 60 seconds. This is real, live data from NOAA SWPC / GOES primary satellite magnetometer, fetched 2026-07-11 01:11 UTC.

total.para1: This chart shows 23.9 hours of total magnetic field strength at the satellite, in nT, recorded by a goes magnetometer — 1,438 measurements, one reading every 60 seconds. This is real, live data from NOAA SWPC / GOES primary satellite magnetometer, fetched 2026-07-11 01:11 UTC.
